description: 88-level with THRU range: VALUE 10 THRU 50 should be true when base is 30
notes: WS-CODE=30 is in range 10-50, so VALID-RANGE is true. 88-level THRU is listed as flagged for manual review in the support matrix, so this may produce a MANUAL REVIEW comment rather than correct code. This tests a very common banking pattern (status code ranges).
